trait Renderable {
    fn render(&self) -> String;
}

struct TextWidget {
    content: String,
}

impl Renderable for TextWidget {
    fn render(&self) -> String {
        self.content.clone()
    }
}

struct ImageWidget {
    path: String,
}

impl Renderable for ImageWidget {
    fn render(&self) -> String {
        format!("<img src=\"{}\">", self.path)
    }
}

fn render_all(widgets: &Vec<Box<dyn Renderable>>) -> String {
    // BAD: dynamic dispatch in hot collection iteration
    widgets.iter().map(|w| w.render()).collect()
}
